
<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

With custom colors
The `limel-spinner` is designed to cycle through ten colors which are all
from Lime Technologies' brand colors.

It is of course possible to override these colors.

## Dependencies

### Depends on

- [limel-spinner](..)
- [limel-example-controls](../../../examples)
- [limel-switch](../../switch)

### Graph
```mermaid
graph TD;
  limel-example-spinner-color --> limel-spinner
  limel-example-spinner-color --> limel-example-controls
  limel-example-spinner-color --> limel-switch
  limel-switch --> limel-dynamic-label
  limel-switch --> limel-helper-line
  limel-dynamic-label --> limel-icon
  style limel-example-spinner-color fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
```
